title: Ports, Protocols, Services, and Traffic Types · Packet Lens: Net Standard Ports
summary: Build and diagnose a service-access matrix from client, firewall, resolver, server, and capture evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net standard ports increment in a verified protocol and service matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use N10-009 standard ports for file transfer, remote administration, mail, DNS, DHCP, web, time, monitoring, directory, database, desktop, and voice services.
Distinguish scalability, elasticity, multitenancy, availability, and geographic placement with measurable requirements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
